name: Rojukiss International Public Company Limited
summary: Rojukiss International Public Company Limited distributes skincare products, cosmetics, and food supplements in Thailand, Hong Kong, Indonesia, and the Philippines. It also provides sales and marketing consulting services under the Sis2Sis brand. The company was formerly known as Aisance Company Limited and changed its name to Rojukiss International Public Company Limited in July 2020. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Huai Khwang, Thailand.
